# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

---
services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service.example.com
    port: 80
  - name: product-service
    host: product-service.example.com
    port: 80

routes:
  - name: user-api
    paths:
      - /users
    service: user-service
  - name: product-api
    paths:
      - /products
    service: product-service

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 100
      policy: local

  - name: caching
    config:
      cache_ttl: 3600
      cache_key: request.path

  - name: logging
    config:
      level: debug
